name: alphaforge-cmc-skill
description: Quantopian-style crypto strategy generation powered by CoinMarketCap. Converts natural-language trading ideas into structured, backtestable strategy specifications with 365-day backtests, Monte Carlo simulation, and three-layer Agent review.

skills.description: Full pipeline: NL intent → regime detection → strategy spec → 365-day backtest → Monte Carlo (1000 paths) → 3-agent review. Outputs machine-readable YAML spec and rich terminal report.

user_input.description: Natural language strategy request in any language. Examples: 'Generate a BTC panic reversal strategy', '我想做 SOL 突破策略，激进一点'

spec.description: YAML-serializable strategy spec with entry/exit rules

backtest.description: 365-day simulation: return, Sharpe, max DD, alpha vs B&H

monte_carlo.description: 1000-path bootstrap: p5/p50/p95 for return, Sharpe, drawdown

regime.description: One of 8 market regimes with confidence and signal values

live_cross_check.description: AlphaForge computed indicators vs CMC Data MCP official TA

skills.description: Classify current market into one of 8 regimes using live CMC data and computed technical features. Returns primary regime, confidence, and driving signals.

asset.description: Ticker symbol, e.g. BTC, ETH, SOL, BNB

skills.description: Bootstrap 1000 equity paths from a strategy backtest to estimate the distribution of possible outcomes. Returns percentile bands for return, Sharpe, and max drawdown.

equity_curve.description: Daily portfolio value series from a backtest run

skills.description: Three-layer agent review chain: RiskAgent (parameter calibration), RegimeAgent (regime-strategy alignment), Gatekeeper (final verdict with Monte Carlo evidence). Returns APPROVED / APPROVED_WITH_WARNINGS / CONDITIONALLY_APPROVED / REJECTED.
